name: godspeed
description: Full Toke engine as a single Claude Code plugin. Ships 16 skills (Brain classifier, Homer orchestrator — Zeus/Calliope/Clio/Urania/Sybil/Mnemos/Oracle/Aurora/Hesper/Nyx, plus godspeed/verify/sitrep/close-session/toke-init), 2 slash commands, 5 lifecycle hooks, and the full Python automation stack. Fires on the word 'godspeed' — scores prompts on S0-S5 complexity, auto-dispatches parallel Sonnet workers for S3+ tasks, critic-gates the synthesis, and persists PASSing answers to a vector-embedded memory.
